texto: But comes a time for a woman when she stops thinking of herself as a girl, as a person of possibilities. She starts looking at the plain facts of herself. Her body that’s become the body that she has and her habits becoming the habits that she’s written in stone. Her “haves” being the ones she’s got and maybe not getting anymore.
explicacao: Citação de Breena Clarke sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “But comes a time for a woman when she stops thinking of herself as a girl, as a person of possibi…” articula reflexao, aging, herself em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
